name: Pancake Waffle
recipeIngredient: 1 cup low fat soy milk (Edensoy vanilla)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the dry ingredients: 2 cups of whole wheat flour and 2 teaspoons of baking powder.
2. In another bowl, combine 2 tablespoons of apple sauce and 1 tablespoon of light unsulphured molasses.
3. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
4. Pour the batter onto a lightly greased waffle iron or griddle. Cook according to your preferred method for pancakes and waffles, using cooking spray if desired.
5. Top with fresh fruit and real maple syrup when ready.
